description: Remove duplicated relational write-path lookup and JSONPath helper code introduced in the DMS-983 seam. Acceptance criteria: `RelationalWriteSupport.GetWritePlanOrThrow` is eliminated in favor of the existing shared mapping-set lookup helper so descriptor/plan guard-rail behavior is defined in one place; the backend-local JSONPath canonicalization/parsing helpers in `RelationalWriteFlattener` and `FlatteningResolvedReferenceLookupSet` are consolidated onto a single shared implementation instead of maintaining separate copies of canonical-build and path-parse logic; redundant helper code is deleted rather than left unused; relational write seam behavior and current error messages remain intentionally unchanged except where needed to preserve the shared helper contract.
steps-to-verify: Add or update unit tests covering write-plan lookup guard rails and the shared JSONPath helper behavior used by both flattening and resolved-reference lookup paths.
